1886820.name: CSCD: Vietnam Mobile Police
1886820.description:
Participate in Tactical Missions Against Terrorist Forces!

Inspired by Vietnam's Mobile Police Force called CSCD (Counter, Secure, Control Division), enjoy exciting and strategic gameplay as you lead your elite squad through high-stakes missions in this immersive tactical shooter.

Let's explore what the game can provide!

1. A FRESH PERSPECTIVE ON VIETNAM

CSCD takes you into the bustling center of modern-day Vietnam, a setting full of life and authenticity. Feel the rich culture infused in every nook and cranny you explore. Stroll through lively streets, winding alleys, and the unique character of its urban landscape.

We meticulously explored the country, immersing ourselves in the details of everyday life. We documented our observations, researched the nuances, and carefully selected the most distinctive elements to faithfully recreate the Vietnamese experience within the game.

2. CORE GAMEPLAY EXPERIENCE

Gameplay is the beating heart of any great game. With CSCD, we've focused on creating compelling mechanics that deliver a unique and engaging experience. Although graphics may not be our strongest feature, we've chosen to focus on gameplay to ensure a truly immersive adventure. Here's a glimpse of what awaits you!

  • Tactical Firefights

    Master a diverse range of aiming techniques tailored for every combat scenario. We've designed a system that feels both intuitive and rewarding, allowing you to adapt to any challenge with precision and skill.

    Features include: free point fire, blind fire, quick aim, deep aim, canted aim.

  • "Hardcore" playstyle

    Prefer a “run and gun” playstyle? Go for it—the game won’t stop you. In fact, there’s even an option tailored for players who enjoy that fast-paced approach. 

    But as you play, you’ll start to see that charging ahead isn’t always the best idea. Any team members you lose won’t come back after a level, so taking a slower, more careful path is often the smarter move.

  • Resource Management

    The "Profiles" system introduces a fresh take on resource management. Oversee personnel, weapons, and equipment, carefully balancing your assets to maximize your team's effectiveness.

    Start with a limited budget and earn credits by completing missions. Invest wisely to upgrade your team and acquire the tools you need to conquer every challenge.

3. CHALLENGING OPPONENTS

A sophisticated AI is crucial, especially for a single-player experience like CSCD: Vietnam Mobile Police. From the outset, the development team has made AI a core focus. Expect enemies capable of coordinated defenses and aggressive assaults, presenting a real test of skill and strategy. 

Thanks to invaluable feedback from our playtesters, we've significantly enhanced the AI's capabilities. We've refined their aiming precision, tactical weapon choices based on distance, teamwork coordination, and environmental awareness, with even more specialized behaviors planned for future enhancements.

4. MODDING - UNLEASH YOUR CREATIVITY

We're committed to fostering a vibrant modding community where your imagination can run wild. Imagine importing your hometown streets, recreating infamous crime scenes, or inventing futuristic weaponry – the possibilities are limitless.

To empower your creativity, we've developed a suite of free, open-source tools: the Map Data Editor (MDE) for crafting environments, the Gun Data Editor (GDE) for weapon customization, and the Attachment Data Editor (ADE) for fine-tuning equipment. Dive deeper into each tool on our project wiki.

We recognize that a thriving modding scene is essential to the game's long-term success. Join us – let's collaborate and build something truly extraordinary together!

---

Get ready to step into the world of CSCD: Vietnam Mobile Police, where challenging battles await you. With a realistic Vietnamese environment, unique gameplay, and strong support from the modding community, the game not only offers a fresh experience but also offers an engaging and immersive experience. Join us, become a brilliant commander, and explore the mysteries within the game. It's time for you to experience and conquer this challenge!
